Mack Hollins 35 Yd pass from Drake Maye (Andy Borregales Kick)
New England — 14 — 3 — 0 — .824 — 490 — 320"},{"url":"https://bleacherreport.com/articles/25393021-super-bowl-2026-final-quarter-quarter-box-score-and-stats-seahawks-vs-patriots","title":"Super Bowl 2026 Final Quarter-by-Quarter Box Score and Stats for Seahawks vs. Patriots","content":"The NFL crowned a new champion Sunday night in Santa Clara, California as the Seattle Seahawks dominated the New England Patriots on the strength of their defense, 29-13.
Relive the biggest football game of the year through this look at the quarter-by-quarter box score and stats for top players.
New England found early success running the ball with Rhamondre Stevenson, but two sacks halted the Drake Maye and the Patriots' first two drives.
Stevenson: 4 carries, 17 yards, reception, 7 yards
The Seattle Seahawks extended their lead in Super Bowl LX in the second quarter of the game.
Cornerback Christian Gonzalez was, arguably, the MVP of the first half, breaking up passes to each receiver that would have resulted in further scores and may have put the game out of hand early.
The dominant Seattle defense continued its shutout of the Patriots, allowing just 25 yards to Maye and Co. while forcing the first turnover of the game when linebacker Derick Hall forced a fumble and DT Byron Murphy II recovered in the second-to-last play of the quarter.
The Seahawks did suffer a big blow late in the quarter, though, when Marcus Jones sniffed out a wide receiver screen to Smith-Njigba and the Offensive Player of the Year's head smacked the ground.
Maye: 2/8, 13 yards, two sacks, fumble
An interception and defensive touchdown for linebacker Uchenna Nwosu, as the NFC champs took a 29-7 lead.
A touchdown just shy of the two-minute warning, from Maye to Stevenson, brought the score to 29-13, and a two-point conversion failed."},{"url":"https://www.nfl.com/news/seahawks-patriots-in-super-bowl-lx-what-we-learned-from-seattle-s-29-13-win","title":"Seahawks-Patriots in Super Bowl LX: What We Learned from Seattle's 29-13 win","content":"Sunday proved the depth of Seattle’s defense with Derick Hall (2), Byron Murphy II (2), Witherspoon and rookie Rylie Mills netting the QB takedowns.
Often, the Pats QB had zero targets open.
It was fitting that Uchenna Nwosu capped off the game with a pick-six off another Witherspoon pressure to start the party in Seattle.
New England punted on all five of its non-kneel first-half possessions, generating just four total first downs.
MVP Walker paces Seahawks offense.
Punter Michael Dickson was marvelous, pinning three punts inside the 7-yard line.
On his 29-yarder, he generated +24 RYOE."},{"url":"https://sports.yahoo.com/nfl/live/super-bowl-2026-seahawks-ride-dominant-defense-to-blowout-of-patriots-second-title-in-franchise-history-180000579.html","title":"Super Bowl 2026: Seahawks ride dominant defense to blowout of Patriots, second title in franchise history - Yahoo Sports","content":"Led by a dominant defense and tremendous special teams, the Seahawks defeated the Patriots 29-13 in Super Bowl 60.
It was a truly dominant performance by the Seahawks’ defense, which racked up six sacks and two interceptions in the win.
Seahawks punter Michael Dickson had two clutch punts to pin the Patriots back late.
Barner had 12-1 odds to score the game’s first TD.
Derick Hall managed to get through the offensive line and swipe the ball away from Maye’s hand as Maye was trying to get away.
Drake Maye: 6 of 11, 48 yards; 0 TDs or TOs; 3 sacks for 30 yards lost
Sam Darnold: 9 of 22, 88 yards; 0 TDs or TOs, 0 sacks taken
Patriots offense: 51 yards on 2 yards per play"},{"url":"https://www.pro-football-reference.com/boxscores/202602080nwe.htm","title":"Super Bowl LX - Seattle Seahawks vs. New England Patriots","content":"Feb 8, 2026 — Seattle Seahawks 29 vs. New England Patriots 13 on February 8th, 2026 - Full team and player stats and box score."}]}

{"query":"Seahawks defense Super Bowl LX sacks turnovers total Patriots offense stats box score","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.patspulpit.com/new-england-patriots-scores-results/121674/super-bowl-2026-live-updates-news-recap-discussion-seattle-seahawks","title":"Patriots vs. Seahawks: Final score, stats, recap from Super Bowl 60 | Pats Pulpit","content":"A New England Patriots Community. Super Bowl LX: New England Patriots v Seattle Seahawks. SANTA CLARA, CALIFORNIA - FEBRUARY 08: Drake Maye #10 of the New England Patriots is sacked by Rylie Mills #98 of the Seattle Seahawks as Jared Wilson #58 of the New England Patriots tries to block during the second quarter in Super Bowl LX at Levi’s Stadium on February 08, 2026 in Santa Clara, California. The New England Patriots dropped Super Bowl LX 29-13 to the Seattle Seahawks. It was a stifling Seahawks defense that prevailed, as they forced Drake Maye and the Patriots offense into eight punts and a trio of turnovers. After a first down run by Kenneth Walker to move the chains, Sam Darnold found a pair of downfield completions to move inside the red zone. After a 12-yard scramble by Maye then set up a 3rd-and-9 after a sack, a blitz off the blindside resulted in a throwaway and punt.","score":0.7272211,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jirkxnDWPNY","title":"Super Bowl LX Recap: Seahawks Ride DOMINANT Defense to 29-13 Win Over Patriots","content":"Super Bowl LX Recap: Seahawks Ride DOMINANT Defense to 29-13 Win Over Patriots

Any short list of the best stories in the NFL this season would have to include the Seattle Seahawks' dominant defense, Sam Darnold's full redemption, and Seattle's ceaseless climb to the top of the league. So it was perhaps fitting that all three of those stories came together on Super Bowl Sunday, resulting in another Lombardi Trophy making its way to the Pacific Northwest.  Robert Mays, Derrik Klassen and Dave Helman recap the Seahawks' 29-13 win over the New England Patriots in Super Bowl LX live from Levi's Stadium on this episode of The Athletic Football Show.
